spec_match.rationale: Wraps a stream reader as AsyncDisposable so releaseLock() runs at scope exit — direct application of the async dispose proposal.

interactive.rationale: Run scenarios that early-return / throw and watch the lock release in the log.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises automatic lock release on scope exit; delivered.

edge_cases.rationale: Now covers a reader.read() rejection from an errored stream and proves cleanup by acquiring a second reader after releaseLock().

summary: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp 1.1.1 on Chrome Canary: clicked run with AsyncDisposable, run without leak, and run errored stream. The errored stream logged reader.read() rejection, releaseLock() with stream.locked=false, and a successful second getReader(); console was clean.
